payload.answer: The timing is ambiguous because “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the date the statement was made or recorded. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Ask the user for the exact date Sam said this, so “last Friday” and “next month” can be resolved.
Ask the user for the intended departure month or exact departure date from Goldman.
Store only the unresolved context as a note: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.
Do not store this until the relative dates are clarified.
